US-4.1-01-admin-logged-in.png.action: The administrator logs in with admin credentials.
US-4.1-01-admin-logged-in.png.expected: The dashboard loads with an Admin tab visible in the navigation bar.

US-4.1-02-admin-panel.png.action: The administrator clicks the Admin tab in the navigation bar.
US-4.1-02-admin-panel.png.expected: The Administration panel opens with five sub-tabs: Utilisateurs, Profils en attente, Import, Parametres, and Logs.

US-4.1-03-user-table.png.action: The administrator views the Utilisateurs tab, which is active by default.
US-4.1-03-user-table.png.expected: A table lists all users with their name, email, role badge, status badge, and action buttons.

US-4.1-04-edit-role.png.action: The administrator clicks Modifier on a user row.
US-4.1-04-edit-role.png.expected: An inline role dropdown appears in the row with Save and Cancel buttons.

US-4.1-05-role-changed.png.action: The administrator selects Admin from the role dropdown and saves.
US-4.1-05-role-changed.png.expected: The user's role badge updates to Admin in the table.

US-4.1-06-invite-dialog.png.action: The administrator clicks the Inviter un utilisateur button.
US-4.1-06-invite-dialog.png.expected: A modal dialog opens with an email input field and a Send Invitation button.

US-4.1-07-invite-sent.png.action: The administrator sends an invitation and the dialog closes.
US-4.1-07-invite-sent.png.expected: The user table is displayed with both users showing Admin roles after the successful invitation.

US-4.1-08-pending-tab.png.action: The administrator clicks the Profils en attente tab.
US-4.1-08-pending-tab.png.expected: The pending profiles table loads showing researchers awaiting approval with Approve and Reject buttons.

US-4.1-09-pending-list.png.action: The administrator views the pending profiles list.
US-4.1-09-pending-list.png.expected: Two profiles are listed — Dr. Emile Rousseau and Dr. Nadia Hamidi — each with lab, themes, submission date, and action buttons.

US-4.1-09-pending-table.png.action: The administrator observes the pending profiles table.
US-4.1-09-pending-table.png.expected: Two profiles are displayed with their laboratory, research themes, submission date, and Approve/Reject buttons.

US-4.1-10-approved.png.action: The administrator clicks Approuver on Dr. Emile Rousseau.
US-4.1-10-approved.png.expected: Dr. Emile Rousseau is removed from the pending list, leaving only Dr. Nadia Hamidi.

US-4.1-11-rejected.png.action: The administrator clicks Rejeter on Dr. Nadia Hamidi.
US-4.1-11-rejected.png.expected: The pending profiles list is now empty, showing no profiles remain.

US-4.1-12-users-tab-full.png.action: The administrator returns to the Utilisateurs tab after role changes.
US-4.1-12-users-tab-full.png.expected: The user table displays both users with Admin roles and active statuses.

US-4.1-13-role-select-inline.png.action: The administrator clicks Modifier on a user to change the role.
US-4.1-13-role-select-inline.png.expected: The role cell becomes an inline dropdown pre-set to Admin with Save and Cancel options.

US-4.1-14-role-select-chercheur.png.action: The administrator changes the role selection to Chercheur.
US-4.1-14-role-select-chercheur.png.expected: The inline dropdown now shows Chercheur selected, ready to be saved.

US-4.1-15-role-saved-chercheur.png.action: The administrator saves the Chercheur role change.
US-4.1-15-role-saved-chercheur.png.expected: The user's role badge updates to Chercheur and the row returns to view mode.

US-4.1-16-revoke-success.png.action: The administrator clicks Revoquer on a user.
US-4.1-16-revoke-success.png.expected: The user's status badge changes to Revoque, indicating their access has been removed.

US-4.1-17-invite-email-typed.png.action: The administrator opens the invite dialog and types a new email address.
US-4.1-17-invite-email-typed.png.expected: The invitation dialog shows the email nouveau@labo.fr typed into the email field.

US-4.1-18-invite-success-toast.png.action: The administrator sends the invitation successfully.
US-4.1-18-invite-success-toast.png.expected: The dialog closes and the user table shows a user with a Revoque status badge.

US-4.1-19-pending-two-profiles.png.action: The administrator views the pending profiles tab with multiple submissions.
US-4.1-19-pending-two-profiles.png.expected: Four pending profiles are listed, including duplicate submissions for the same researchers.

US-4.1-20-pending-after-approve.png.action: The administrator approves one pending profile.
US-4.1-20-pending-after-approve.png.expected: Three profiles remain in the pending list after one is removed following approval.

US-4.1-E1-empty-pending.png.action: The administrator views the pending profiles tab after all profiles have been processed.
US-4.1-E1-empty-pending.png.expected: The empty state message Aucun profil en attente is displayed with no table rows.

US-4.1-E2-self-revoke-btn-disabled.png.action: The administrator attempts to revoke their own account.
US-4.1-E2-self-revoke-btn-disabled.png.expected: The user table shows the admin's own Revoquer button in a disabled state.

US-4.1-E2-self-revoke-disabled.png.action: The administrator views the user table while logged in as Admin CartoPM.
US-4.1-E2-self-revoke-disabled.png.expected: Both users are shown with Admin roles; the Revoquer button on the admin's own row is visually distinct.

US-4.1-E3-invite-dialog.png.action: The administrator opens the invite dialog to test an error scenario.
US-4.1-E3-invite-dialog.png.expected: The invitation dialog appears with an empty email field showing the placeholder text.

US-4.1-E3-invite-error.png.action: The administrator submits an invitation for an already-registered email address.
US-4.1-E3-invite-error.png.expected: The invite dialog closes and the user table is shown; the failed invitation leaves no new user added.

US-4.2-01-import-tab.png.action: The administrator clicks the Import tab in the admin panel.
US-4.2-01-import-tab.png.expected: The Import screen loads with a drag-and-drop file zone and a Google Scholar URL input field.

US-4.2-02-csv-preview.png.action: The administrator uploads a CSV file via the drop zone.
US-4.2-02-csv-preview.png.expected: A preview table appears showing 2 entries — Dr. Jean Martin and Dr. Sophie Bernard — both tagged as Nouveau.

US-4.2-03-import-success.png.action: The administrator uploads a different CSV file and sees the preview.
US-4.2-03-import-success.png.expected: A preview table shows 2 new entries — Dr. Jean Martin and Dr. Alice Petit — ready to be imported.

US-4.2-04-duplicate-detected.png.action: The administrator re-imports a CSV file that was previously imported.
US-4.2-04-duplicate-detected.png.expected: The preview table flags both rows with Doublon detecte badges and the button shows Importer 0 chercheurs.

US-4.2-05-scholar-url-typed.png.action: The administrator pastes a Google Scholar profile URL into the Scholar URL field.
US-4.2-05-scholar-url-typed.png.expected: The URL field contains the Scholar URL and the Importer button is available to trigger the fetch.

US-4.2-06-csv-preview-new.png.action: The administrator encounters a Scholar URL error while a CSV preview is also shown.
US-4.2-06-csv-preview-new.png.expected: An error message URL invalide ou profil introuvable appears above a preview table with two new entries.

US-4.2-07-csv-preview-scroll.png.action: The administrator views the import tab with a Scholar error and scrolled-down CSV preview.
US-4.2-07-csv-preview-scroll.png.expected: The Scholar error and a 2-entry preview table are visible together, with an Import button at the bottom.

US-4.2-08-import-success-logs-btn.png.action: The administrator confirms an import showing the Scholar error state and CSV preview.
US-4.2-08-import-success-logs-btn.png.expected: The Scholar error is shown alongside the CSV preview table with the Importer button ready.

US-4.2-09-import-success-with-logs-btn.p.action: The administrator successfully imports researchers from a CSV file.
US-4.2-09-import-success-with-logs-btn.p.expected: A green success banner reads 2 chercheur(s) importe(s) avec succes with a Voir les logs button.

US-4.2-10-duplicate-detection.png.action: The administrator uploads a CSV containing entries that already exist in the database.
US-4.2-10-duplicate-detection.png.expected: The preview shows both rows flagged as Doublon detecte in orange, and the import button shows 0 researchers to import.

US-4.2-E1-invalid-format.png.action: The administrator uploads a CSV file with incorrect column headers.
US-4.2-E1-invalid-format.png.expected: An error message appears reading Format invalide: colonnes attendues: Nom, Labo, Themes.

US-4.2-E2-scholar-url-error.png.action: The administrator submits an invalid Google Scholar URL.
US-4.2-E2-scholar-url-error.png.expected: An error message URL invalide ou profil introuvable appears below the Scholar input field.

US-4.3-01-settings-tab.png.action: The administrator navigates to the Parametres tab.
US-4.3-01-settings-tab.png.expected: The settings form loads showing Language radio buttons, a similarity threshold slider at 0.30, and an NLP algorithm dropdown.

US-4.3-02-slider-changed.png.action: The administrator drags the similarity threshold slider to 0.52.
US-4.3-02-slider-changed.png.expected: The slider updates to 0.52 and an unsaved changes indicator appears next to the save button.

US-4.3-03-settings-saved.png.action: The administrator clicks Sauvegarder les parametres.
US-4.3-03-settings-saved.png.expected: The settings are saved; the unsaved indicator remains visible as the current state is preserved.

US-4.3-04-settings-default.png.action: The administrator views the settings panel in its default saved state.
US-4.3-04-settings-default.png.expected: The settings form shows Francais selected, threshold at 0.30, and TF-IDF algorithm with no unsaved indicator.

US-4.3-05-settings-english-bert.png.action: The administrator changes language to English and algorithm to BERT.
US-4.3-05-settings-english-bert.png.expected: English is selected as language, BERT (Contextuel, lent) appears in the algorithm dropdown, with an unsaved indicator.

US-4.3-06-settings-save-result.png.action: The administrator has English and BERT selected with unsaved changes.
US-4.3-06-settings-save-result.png.expected: The settings form shows English selected, BERT algorithm, and the unsaved changes text is still visible.

US-4.3-06-settings-saved-english-bert.pn.action: The administrator saves the English and BERT configuration.
US-4.3-06-settings-saved-english-bert.pn.expected: The settings form shows English and BERT saved with no unsaved indicator displayed.

US-4.3-E1-zero-threshold.png.action: The administrator drags the similarity slider to 0.00.
US-4.3-E1-zero-threshold.png.expected: An orange inline warning reads Un seuil de 0.0 considerera tous les chercheurs comme proches below the slider.

US-4.3-E2-unsaved-nav-prompt.png.action: The administrator attempts to navigate away from settings with unsaved changes.
US-4.3-E2-unsaved-nav-prompt.png.expected: A confirmation dialog appears asking Modifications non sauvegardees, quitter quand meme with Annuler and Quitter buttons.

US-4.4-01-logs-tab.png.action: The administrator navigates to the Logs tab.
US-4.4-01-logs-tab.png.expected: The audit log table loads with date filter inputs and rows showing Date/Heure, Utilisateur, Action tag, and Detail columns.

US-4.4-02-logs-date-filter.png.action: The administrator sets the date filter to 14/04/2026 and clicks Filtrer.
US-4.4-02-logs-date-filter.png.expected: The log table shows only entries from today, and a Tout afficher button appears to clear the filter.

US-4.4-03-logs-filter-cleared.png.action: The administrator clicks Tout afficher to clear the date filter.
US-4.4-03-logs-filter-cleared.png.expected: The date inputs reset to empty and all log entries are displayed again.

US-4.4-04-logs-action-tags.png.action: The administrator scrolls through all audit log entries.
US-4.4-04-logs-action-tags.png.expected: The full log is visible with color-coded action tags: Suppression in red, Modification in blue, and Ajout in green.

US-4.4-05-logs-after-import-config.png.action: The administrator views the audit log after performing an import and a settings change.
US-4.4-05-logs-after-import-config.png.expected: New log entries appear at the top: a Configuration entry for the settings change and an Import entry for the CSV import.
